reviews.comment:
Cuenta con un gran shop pero no aceptan dentro del mismo la App de YPF.
Baños limpios y equipados, buena atención del personal pero una lástima lo anteriormente mencionado ya que es una de las estaciones con mayor movimiento de gente por su ubicación.

(Translated by Google)
It has a large shop, but they don't accept the YPF app inside.
The restrooms are clean and well-equipped, and the staff is friendly, but it's a shame about the aforementioned issue, as it's one of the busiest stations due to its location.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3904387536841865428/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNnIzU3N3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños estaban muy sucios.
En la tienda las tres personas que estaban, realmente se veían sobrepasadas con la demanda de clientes. Y eso repercutía en la regular atención. El aire acondicionado no funcionaba de manera óptima.
Hamburguesas y papas, muy ricas, precio accesible.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very dirty.
The three people working in the store seemed overwhelmed by the number of customers, which resulted in poor service. The air conditioning wasn't working properly.
The hamburgers and fries were delicious and reasonably priced.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3904387536841865428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtME9qWFpREAE
